{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Champion gift
| introduced = ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness
}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|A [[Champion gift]] can allow a person to stay balanced during a storm.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c4">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
